# Ghost Shark Factory Opens in Sydney — First Vehicle Off the Line Ahead of Schedule, Ready for Undersea Acceptance Testing

Just seven weeks after the Royal Australian Navy awarded a A$1.7 billion Program of Record, Anduril today officially opened its new, state-of-the-art Ghost Shark manufacturing facility in Sydney.
